summary: Matched a batch of previously undecompiled ground animation helper functions in src/melee/gr/granime.c and added the header declarations needed for their call sites. The new code wraps common HSD_JObj animation operations behind grAnime helpers, including flag-mask construction from bitfield arguments, material setup before animation requests, and a setjmp/longjmp-based early-exit search through HSD_ForeachAnim. Evidence is limited to the PR title and diff excerpt; no review discussion was available.

key_files.role: Main implementation file; added matched grAnime helpers around HSD_JObj animation traversal, request, clear-flags, rate-setting, material setup, and setjmp/longjmp search behavior.
Updated prototypes for matched and referenced grAnime functions, including variadic grAnime_801C752C and grAnime_801C7C1C.
Added declarations for grMaterial_801C8B28 and grMaterial_801C8B68 used by the new grAnime material-animation wrappers.

what_changed: Included gr/granime.h, gr/grmaterial.h, gr/ground.h, gr/inlines.h, and Runtime/Gecko_setjmp.h in grAnime.c to support the newly matched implementations.

Added matched implementations for grAnime_801C775C, grAnime_801C77FC, grAnime_801C78FC, grAnime_801C7980, grAnime_801C7A04, grAnime_801C7A94, grAnime_801C7B24, grAnime_801C7BA0, grAnime_801C7FF8, grAnime_801C8098, fn_801C82E8, and grAnime_801C8318.

Left several nearby functions as nonmatched placeholders using decomp marker comments, including grAnime_801C752C, grAnime_801C7C1C, grAnime_801C8138, grAnime_801C83D0, grAnime_801C84A4, grAnime_801C8578, grAnime_801C86D4, and grAnime_801C8780.
Changed grAnime_801C78FC and grAnime_801C7A04 header prototypes from signed s32 flag parameters to int/u32 forms that match the new call patterns.
Declared grAnime_801C752C as variadic in granime.h because new wrappers pass different callback signatures and argument counts through it.
Added a prototype for grAnime_801C7C1C with the full argument list used by the newly matched wrappers.
Declared grMaterial_801C8B28 and grMaterial_801C8B68 in grmaterial.h for material JObj lookup/setup before animation requests.
smart_moves: Reused the same explicit bitmask-building pattern across multiple wrappers: arg2 bit 1 maps to 0x220, bit 2 maps to 0x7484, and bit 4 maps to 0x100 for HSD_ForeachAnim-style operations.
Used a separate mask family for animation request helpers: arg2 bit 1 maps to 0x81, bit 2 maps to 0x416, and bit 4 maps to 8 before calling HSD_JObjReqAnimAllByFlags or HSD_JObjReqAnimByFlags.
Guarded Ground_801C3FA4 results with early NULL returns, preserving compact control flow and avoiding dereferencing missing stage JObjs.

Kept grAnime_801C752C variadic rather than forcing a guessed callback-specific prototype; this fits evidence from call sites that pass HSD_AObjClearFlags, HSD_AObjSetRate, and custom callbacks with differing trailing arguments.
For grAnime_801C7FF8 and grAnime_801C8098, checked both GET_GROUND(gobj) and arg3 >= 0 before looking up a JObj and applying material animation setup.
Matched an early-exit animation search by pairing __setjmp with a callback that writes the found value and longjmps out of HSD_ForeachAnim.
decomp_lessons: When a group of small wrappers share identical flag derivation, preserve the repeated if-statement structure if it matches codegen rather than abstracting into a helper.

For decomp progress, it can be productive to match leaf-like wrapper functions around an unmatched core routine, as shown by new callers around grAnime_801C752C and grAnime_801C7C1C while those targets remain marked with decomp placeholders.
Header work often needs to accompany small matching PRs: new matches may expose previously local or undeclared dependencies in neighboring systems such as grmaterial.
Variadic declarations can be a pragmatic temporary typing strategy for dispatcher-style decomp functions when call sites demonstrate multiple callback argument layouts.
setjmp/longjmp behavior in matching code should use the project/runtime header, here Runtime/Gecko_setjmp.h, and preserve the callback side effect before longjmp.
Ground animation wrappers commonly begin by translating a Ground_GObj/HSD_GObj plus index into an HSD_JObj through Ground_801C3FA4, then delegate to baselib animation APIs.
naming_conventions: Unidentified matched functions remain address-based with subsystem prefixes, e.g. grAnime_801C775C and grMaterial_801C8B28.
Local compiler-style temporaries such as var_r31, var_r30, temp_r3, and sp14 were retained in the diff, indicating matching-first naming rather than semantic cleanup.
Internal helper callback names use fn_ADDRESS form when no semantic name is known, e.g. fn_801C82E8.
Global data symbols use subsystem plus address naming, e.g. grAnime_804D6958, grAnime_804D695C, and grAnime_8049EE40.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Preserve bitmask OR order and constants exactly for argument-derived HSD type masks: 0x220, 0x7484, 0x100, 0x81, 0x416, and 8.
Use early returns on NULL HSD_JObj lookups to match small wrapper control flow.
Use int versus u32/s32 parameter typing carefully; this PR adjusted public prototypes to u32 for bitfield arguments in grAnime_801C78FC and grAnime_801C7A04.
Use a variadic prototype for grAnime_801C752C to allow calls like grAnime_801C752C(jobj, 1, mask, HSD_AObjClearFlags, 3, 0x20000000) and grAnime_801C752C(jobj, 1, mask, HSD_AObjSetRate, 1, val).
Model nonlocal exit from HSD_ForeachAnim with __setjmp returning 0 on the traversal path and a callback invoking longjmp after writing to an out-parameter.
Before invoking grAnime_801C7C1C in material-related wrappers, call grMaterial_801C8B28 on the target JObj and grMaterial_801C8B68(jobj, 0).

review_feedback.feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR context.
The context reports one issue comment, but no comment body excerpt was provided, so no grounded review feedback can be extracted.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that semantically renamed grAnime_801C775C through grAnime_801C8318 or replaced address-based names.
Search for subsequent matches of grAnime_801C752C, grAnime_801C7C1C, grAnime_801C8138, grAnime_801C83D0, grAnime_801C84A4, grAnime_801C8578, grAnime_801C86D4, and grAnime_801C8780.
Look for other uses of the flag masks 0x220, 0x7484, 0x100, 0x81, and 0x416 to infer semantic names for animation component flags.
Search for additional uses of grAnime_8049EE40 and fn_801C82E8 to understand the setjmp/longjmp traversal idiom in this subsystem.
Check whether grAnime_801C752C remains variadic or later gains a typed callback abstraction.
